prompt: A highly detailed, realistic sci-fi fantasy concept art of a high-level monster named 'Sesquipedalian Avant'. It is a quantum-themed hybrid creature, blending sophisticated alien biology with intricate, glowing machine parts. It has a tall, slender humanoid form with elongated limbs, multiple translucent crystalline eyes, and floating geometric arrays around its head. Its body is encased in a sleek, shifting metallic exoskeleton that pulses with blue quantum energy. The art style matches Magic: The Gathering, with dramatic lighting, detailed textures, and a sense of scientific wonder and ancient power. Full body character from head to toe in frame, standing in a neutral T-pose for 3D modeling reference, front view, clean grey studio background. High resolution, professional concept art.
